title: Resolver Zone
description: Statistics of DNS requests and responses per particular resolver zone.

name.description: The total number of requests to resolve names to addresses.

srv.description: The total number of requests to resolve SRV records.

addr.description: The total number of requests to resolve addresses to names.

noerror.description: The total number of successful responses.

formerr.description: The total number of FORMERR (<literal>Format error</literal>) responses.

servfail.description: The total number of SERVFAIL (<literal>Server failure</literal>) responses.

nxdomain.description: The total number of NXDOMAIN (<literal>Host not found</literal>) responses.

notimp.description: The total number of NOTIMP (<literal>Unimplemented</literal>) responses.

refused.description: The total number of REFUSED (<literal>Operation refused</literal>) responses.

timedout.description: The total number of timed out requests.

unknown.description: The total number of requests completed with an unknown error.
